section: BSc Majors – Applied Mathematics to Statistics & Data Science
notes: Course combinations marked 'Either/Or' indicate interchangeable alternatives. 'And' indicates both courses must be taken. 'One of / Two of / Any n of' indicates the required number of selections from a listed group. Recommended courses are optional but encouraged. Where MAM1004F/S is listed, it can be replaced by MAM1031F unless stated otherwise.
